title: Mackintosh's Closed-Sign Directive
description: You observe Mackintosh lean down to the nearest floor walker and speak directly into his ear, then watch the floor walker move immediately to the counter with a 'Counter Closed' card. The directive did not come from store policy — it came from a personal, in-the-moment decision by the manager, and it was issued after the students were already seated and after no disturbance had occurred. This is not a routine closing. This is a targeted response to the presence of the students specifically.
